name: San Diego Funding
description_short: Southern California mortgage lender offering home purchase, refinance, FHA, VA, and jumbo loans since 1981 with direct lending capabilities.
description_long:
San Diego Funding has operated as a mortgage lender in Southern California for over 40 years, establishing itself alongside sister company Great Pacific Funding as a regional leader in home financing. The company serves borrowers in San Diego County and Orange County with a team of experienced loan officers committed to personalized service throughout the lending process. They position themselves as a direct lender, which they claim provides clients with competitive advantages in terms of rate offerings, product flexibility, and closing speed. The company emphasizes its dual identity as both a direct lender and product innovator in the competitive Southern California mortgage market.

San Diego Funding's service portfolio includes conventional loans, jumbo mortgages, FHA loans, VA loans, and specialty financing products. Based on customer testimonials, specific loan officers mentioned include Alexis, Linnea (part of the Arrington Team), and Rob Johnson. The company promotes itself on the basis of expert guidance, competitive mortgage rates, and efficient on-time closings. Customer reviews highlight responsiveness to borrower questions, availability across multiple days and hours, and hands-on support through complex transactions including 30-day escrows and non-standard purchase scenarios.

The company differentiates itself primarily through personalized relationship-based lending rather than through advertised product innovation. Customer testimonials emphasize specific loan officer names and their accessibility, suggesting a relationship-based rather than transactional model. The Arrington Team is specifically highlighted for coordinating across multiple borrowers and maintaining communication throughout extended processes. Several reviews note the company's willingness to work through complications (slow HOAs, complex purchases, bridge financing scenarios) and its ability to explain rate trends and mortgage options to borrowers.

As a regional mortgage lender without national presence, San Diego Funding's service area appears limited to Southern California. The company does not advertise specific rate information, loan limits, or product details on their website, requiring borrowers to contact loan officers directly for quotes. Like all mortgage lenders, approval depends on credit, income, and property qualification. The heavy reliance on individual loan officer reputation suggests service quality may vary by team.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Established 40+ year track record in Southern California mortgage lending with consistent regional presence
Operates as direct lender, potentially offering rate and terms advantages over broker model
Loan officers maintain high availability and responsiveness across multiple days and hours per customer feedback
Experienced handling of complex transactions including 30-day escrows, bridge financing, and multiple borrower scenarios
Staff can explain rate environment and market conditions (Fed announcements) to help borrowers time rate locks
Multiple loan officer teams available (Arrington Team, Rob Johnson, etc.) reducing single-point-of-failure risk
Portfolio includes conventional, jumbo, FHA, VA, and specialty financing products
cons: Service area limited to San Diego County and Orange County; no national presence or remote closing options advertised
Website lacks specific product details, rate information, or loan limits—requires direct contact for pricing
No mention of rate-lock guarantees, price-match policies, or transparent fee structures
Heavy reliance on individual loan officer reputation suggests service quality and responsiveness may vary significantly by team
No online application portal, rate calculator, or self-service tools mentioned on website
best_for: Southern California home buyers with complex purchase scenarios (bridge loans, short escrows, multiple borrowers)
Borrowers prioritizing relationship-based lending and personal accessibility over online convenience
VA and FHA loan applicants seeking local expertise in Southern California market
Jumbo loan applicants seeking a direct lender alternative to brokers
diagnosis: San Diego Funding is best for Southern California home buyers who value personalized service, local expertise, and direct lender relationships over convenience and transparency. Primary caveat: the company's limited geographic footprint and lack of published rates/terms requires direct outreach, and service quality appears dependent on individual loan officer assignment rather than standardized processes.
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 880 W Washington St, San Diego, CA 92103
